'''jopathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:meadowed|meadowed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-p-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meadowed|meadowed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jopathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jopathithi|jopathithi]] || [[word:jopathiji|jopathiji]] || [[word:jopathishi|jopathishi]] || [[word:jopathiki|jopathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jopathuthuthu|jopathuthuthu]] || [[word:jopathujuju|jopathujuju]] || [[word:jopathushushu|jopathushushu]] || [[word:jopathukuku|jopathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jopathuthu|jopathuthu]] || [[word:jopathuju|jopathuju]] || [[word:jopathushu|jopathushu]] || [[word:jopathuku|jopathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jopathufthuf|jopathufthuf]] || [[word:jopathufjuf|jopathufjuf]] || [[word:jopathufshuf|jopathufshuf]] || [[word:jopathufkuf|jopathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jopathethe|jopathethe]] || [[word:jopatheje|jopatheje]] || [[word:jopatheshe|jopatheshe]] || [[word:jopatheke|jopatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jopathothotho|jopathothotho]] || [[word:jopathojojo|jopathojojo]] || [[word:jopathoshosho|jopathoshosho]] || [[word:jopathokoko|jopathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jopathotho|jopathotho]] || [[word:jopathojo|jopathojo]] || [[word:jopathosho|jopathosho]] || [[word:jopathoko|jopathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jopathofthof|jopathofthof]] || [[word:jopathofjof|jopathofjof]] || [[word:jopathofshof|jopathofshof]] || [[word:jopathofkof|jopathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jopathĂŻfthĂŻf|jopathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jopathĂŻfjĂŻf|jopathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jopathĂŻfshĂŻf|jopathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jopathĂŻfkĂŻf|jopathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jopathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|jopathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jopathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|jopathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jopathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|jopathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jopathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|jopathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jopathĂŻfthĂŻf|jopathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jopathĂŻfjĂŻf|jopathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jopathĂŻfshĂŻf|jopathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jopathĂŻfkĂŻf|jopathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jopathĂŻfthĂŻf|jopathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jopathĂŻfjĂŻf|jopathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jopathĂŻfshĂŻf|jopathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jopathĂŻfkĂŻf|jopathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jopathĂŠthĂŠ|jopathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jopathĂŠjĂŠ|jopathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jopathĂŠshĂŠ|jopathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jopathĂŠkĂŠ|jopathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jopathathatha|jopathathatha]] || [[word:jopathajaja|jopathajaja]] || [[word:jopathashasha|jopathashasha]] || [[word:jopathakaka|jopathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jopathatha|jopathatha]] || [[word:jopathaja|jopathaja]] || [[word:jopathasha|jopathasha]] || [[word:jopathaka|jopathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jopathafthaf|jopathafthaf]] || [[word:jopathafjaf|jopathafjaf]] || [[word:jopathafshaf|jopathafshaf]] || [[word:jopathafkaf|jopathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jopathasha|jopathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jopathshĂ«sha|jopathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jopathrosha|jopathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jopathmusha|jopathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jopathyasha|jopathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojopathnkshĂ«sha|gojopathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojopathnkrosha|gojopathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojopathnkmusha|gojopathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojopathnkyasha|gojopathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jopapathasha|jopapathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jopapathshĂ«sha|jopapathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jopapathrosha|jopapathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jopapathmusha|jopapathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jopapathyasha|jopapathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojopapathnkshĂ«sha|gojopapathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojopapathnkrosha|gojopapathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojopapathnkmusha|gojopapathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojopapathnkyasha|gojopapathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jepĂŠthasha|jepĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jepĂŠthshĂ«sha|jepĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jepĂŠthrosha|jepĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jepĂŠthmusha|jepĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jepĂŠthyasha|jepĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojepĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|gojepĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojepĂŠthnkrosha|gojepĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojepĂŠthnkmusha|gojepĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojepĂŠthnkyasha|gojepĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jopfathasha|jopfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jopfathshĂ«sha|jopfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jopfathrosha|jopfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jopfathmusha|jopfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jopfathyasha|jopfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojopfathnkshĂ«sha|gojopfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojopfathnkrosha|gojopfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojopfathnkmusha|gojopfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojopfathnkyasha|gojopfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
